eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Broward, FL; at 11:49 AM ON MAR 6, 2026 Effective until 12:49 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Heavy smoke due to a fire is impacting the area. It is recommended for those with respiratory problems and medical conditions to shelter in place if possible. Stay indoors. close windows and doors and recirculate ventilation systems. Follow Broward County social media and local news for additional information. No evacuations necessary.
